questions.question: Какие компоненты FLIP-27 Source API и где они выполняются?

options.text: Source factory (сериализуется и shipped); SplitEnumerator runs на JobManager (внутри SourceCoordinator) — discovers splits, assigns к readers; SourceReader runs per parallel subtask на TaskManager — fetches data, emits records, snapshots own state
Только SourceReader on все TaskManagers равноправно
SplitEnumerator + SourceReader оба на каждом TaskManager

questions.explanation: FLIP-27 — separation of concerns: Source (factory, no runtime state — shipped к JM и всем TM) + SplitEnumerator (один per source per job, runs внутри SourceCoordinator на JobManager — split discovery, assignment, recovery coordination) + SourceReader (один per parallel subtask на TaskManager — actual data fetching, emit, per-split state). Communication между JM↔TM через OperatorEventDispatcher (gRPC). Это replacement для legacy SourceFunction который был single class на TaskManager без proper coordination.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — секция Three core components

questions.question: Что значит Boundedness в FLIP-27 и как это enables unified batch/streaming?

options.text: Boundedness только для legacy batch DataSet API

Boundedness — runtime property Source (BOUNDED vs CONTINUOUS_UNBOUNDED). Same Source implementation может both modes через configuration. BOUNDED — SplitEnumerator emits notifyNoMoreSplits после exhaustion → SourceReader returns END_OF_INPUT → batch finalization. CONTINUOUS_UNBOUNDED — keeps discovering forever. Это foundation unified DataStream batch/streaming в Flink
Это enum для определения types of records

questions.explanation: Boundedness enum — fundamental enabler unified batch/streaming. KafkaSource.setBounded(OffsetsInitializer.latest()) делает source BOUNDED (stops at current Kafka end), без этого CONTINUOUS_UNBOUNDED. FileSource forBulkFileFormat без monitorContinuously — BOUNDED, с monitorContinuously — CONTINUOUS_UNBOUNDED. Runtime: BOUNDED enables batch finalization (sinks finalize commits, windows эмитят final results). С env.setRuntimeMode(BATCH) Flink applies дополнительные optimizations (sort-based shuffles, blocking aggregations). Это why FLIP-27 essential — pre-FLIP-27 batch требовал DataSet API, теперь DataStream работает для both modes.

questions.question: Production issue: SplitEnumerator делает heavy S3 listing (10s каждый цикл), split assignment latency growing, readers idle. Что fix?

options.text: SplitEnumerator runs single-threaded в SourceCoordinator thread pool — heavy blocking work blocks split assignment. Fix: использовать context.callAsync() для async listing работы; cache discovery results; use S3 prefix-based listing efficiently; для очень больших prefixes — partition по date prefix или manifest-based listing (Iceberg approach)

questions.explanation: SplitEnumerator runs sequentially в SourceCoordinator. Heavy blocking ops (S3 listing 10M files) блокируют processing split requests от readers → idle readers waiting for work. SplitEnumeratorContext.callAsync(supplier, handler) provides async work mechanism — supplier runs в separate thread, handler called в coordinator thread when done. Plus best practices: limit S3 listing scope через prefix-based partitioning (year/month/day), cache results, use Iceberg/Paimon manifest для O(1) listing вместо O(N) listing. Это common production issue с custom FileSource over massive directories.

questions.question: Watermark Alignment (FLIP-217) работает на уровне SourceCoordinator (JobManager) и может pause faster sources чтобы синхронизировать с slower в alignment group.
questions.explanation: Правда. FLIP-217 Watermark Alignment coordinated через SourceCoordinator на JM. WatermarkStrategy.withWatermarkAlignment('group', maxDrift, updateInterval) declares group. SourceCoordinator collects watermarks from все sources в group, computes max allowed watermark = min(group_watermarks) + maxDrift. Sources advancing past этого pause-яются (SourceReader._suspended_) пока slow source не догонит. Это predicate для multi-source CEP/joins — без alignment fast source overflow state buffers waiting for slow source's events. Trade-off: fast source paused = effective backpressure через watermark mechanism.
